user.title: Home Keeper — Bambu Lab
user.description: Surface a Bambu Lab printer's firmware update as a Home Keeper task, so a pending update shows up in your to-do list. The task clears itself once the printer's firmware is up to date. Requires both Home Keeper and the Bambu Lab integration.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is needed.

data_description.name_template: Use {printer_name} for the printer. Default: "Update firmware: {printer_name}".
